description_long: This is a medium-sized, open-deck boat with a streamlined, elongated hull painted primarily in blue and white, with a red lower section. The deck is open and features wooden planks, with some visible seating and equipment along the sides. The bow is pointed and slightly raised, while the stern is squared off, suggesting a utilitarian design suitable for transport or fishing. The boat's sides display some text and markings, and there are railings and fixtures along the perimeter for safety and utility. The overall construction appears robust, with metal and wood components visible, and the vessel is designed to accommodate several passengers or cargo. The boat's appearance suggests it is intended for use in calm waters such as rivers, harbors, or urban waterfronts.
description: A medium-sized, open-deck blue and white boat with a red lower hull, wooden planked interior, and visible railings and fixtures. The vessel is robust and utilitarian, suitable for transport or fishing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated blue and white hull, red lower section, and open deck with visible fixtures and railings.
description_view_1: Front (bow) view highlighting the pointed bow, open wooden deck, and interior seating arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the hull, red lower section, and side markings.
description_view_3: Rear (stern) view showing the squared-off stern, open deck, and entry area.
